prediction_reason.历年位次与招生计划: 2021–2025年物理类最低位次约11747→12155→12582→10130→9598，整体呈先升后降再升的波动走势；2024年位次大幅前移至10130名，2025年进一步前移至9598名，近两年累计前移约2984名，显示报考热度明显升温；该校在云南物理类招生计划2021年79人、2022年78人、2023年79人、2024年86人、2025年93人，呈持续扩招趋势；2026年计划增至102人，较2025年增加9人（+9.7%），扩招幅度较大，一定程度上缓解竞争压力。

prediction_reason.专业热度与地域: 计算机类、电气工程、电子信息等热门工科专业社会热度持续偏高，该校相关专业招生计划有所增加；云南2026年高考总报名人数约37.79万，较2025年物理类+历史类合计约28.57万大幅增长约32%，物理类考生估算约22.9万，竞争基数显著扩大；西北农林科技大学位于陕西咸阳，属西北地区；云南考生对省外985高校报考意愿较强，该校作为农林类985在西南地区有一定地域吸引力。
prediction_reason.预测结论: 综合2025年基准位次9598名、2026年扩招9.7%（使位次后移约557名）及云南考生总数大幅增长约32%（使竞争加剧）三方面因素；考虑软科排名持续上升、学校层次提升的正面效应，以及考生规模激增带来的竞争压力，在基准位次基础上小幅上调50名；预测2026年物理类最低位次约10205名，区间9705–10705名。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plans
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum ranking for Physics Category was approximately 11747 → 12155 → 12582 → 10130 → 9598, showing a fluctuating trend of first rising, then falling, then rising again; in 2024, the ranking significantly moved forward to 10130, and in 2025 further moved forward to 9598, with a cumulative forward shift of about 2984 in the last two years, indicating a clear increase in application popularity; the enrollment plan for this university in Yunnan for Physics Category was 79 in 2021, 78 in 2022, 79 in 2023, 86 in 2024, and 93 in 2025, showing a continuous expansion trend; the 2026 plan increases to 102, an increase of 9 (+9.7%) compared to 2025, a relatively large expansion, which to some extent alleviates competition pressure.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: 985 Project, 211 Project, Double First-Class construction university; the Soft Science University Ranking has been continuously rising, from 76th in 2021 to 69th in 2026, with steady improvement in ranking, and the university's comprehensive strength and recognition have been increasing year by year; in 2022, there was a negative incident of academic misconduct by a teacher, but no major negative public opinion has emerged in recent years; the comprehensive popularity ranking on Douyin is 75th (average evaluation), with short video platform exposure at a mid-level, showing no obvious surge in popularity or negative fermentation; Crop Science A-, Plant Protection A-, Animal Science A-, Grassland Science A-, all four disciplines are A- level, with strong disciplinary strength in the field of agriculture and forestry; among the enrollment majors, agriculture, plant protection, animal science, etc., highly correspond to the advantageous disciplines.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Popular engineering majors such as Computer Science, Electrical Engineering, and Electronic Information have consistently high social popularity, and the enrollment plans for related majors at this university have increased; the total number of candidates for the 2026 Yunnan college entrance examination is about 377,900, a significant increase of about 32% compared to the total of about 285,700 for Physics Category + History Category in 2025, with an estimated 229,000 Physics Category candidates, significantly expanding the competition base; Northwest A&F University is located in Xianyang, Shaanxi, in the northwest region; Yunnan candidates have a strong willingness to apply for 985 universities outside the province, and as an agriculture and forestry 985, this university has a certain regional appeal in the southwest region.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Comprehensively considering the 2025 baseline ranking of 9598, the 2026 enrollment expansion of 9.7% (which would shift the ranking back by about 557), and the significant increase of about 32% in the total number of Yunnan candidates (which intensifies competition); taking into account the positive effects of the continuously rising Soft Science ranking and the improvement in university level, as well as the competitive pressure from the surge in candidate numbers, a small upward adjustment of 50 places is made based on the baseline ranking; the predicted minimum ranking for Physics Category in 2026 is about 10205, with a range of 9705–10705.

major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: Predicted ranking is about 10205, with a range of 9705–10705. Candidates with rankings within the lower limit of the range (9705) can focus on sprinting for Tier 1 popular engineering majors such as Electrical Engineering and Computer Science; candidates with rankings in the middle of the range (about 10200) are advised to prioritize Tier 2 majors, with Tier 1 as a sprint and Tier 3 as a safety; candidates with rankings near the upper limit (10705) are advised to focus on Tier 3 majors, while also considering lower-ranking Tier 2 majors. The admission rankings for majors corresponding to the university's advantageous agricultural and forestry disciplines are relatively low, making them suitable as safety choices for candidates interested in the agricultural and forestry field.

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2024, the minimum ranking for liberal arts was approximately 1890 → 2029 → 2255 → 1782, showing a fluctuating trend of first decreasing, then increasing, and then decreasing again; in 2024, the ranking moved forward to 1782, the best level in the past four years. In 2025, the university did not offer a history category enrollment plan in Yunnan, so there is no 2025 ranking baseline; the university's liberal arts/history category enrollment plan in Yunnan was 9 in 2021, 9 in 2022, 7 in 2023, and 9 in 2024, with no enrollment in 2025; in 2026, history category enrollment resumes with a plan of 7, a decrease of 2 (-22.2%) compared to the 2024 liberal arts plan of 9, a significant reduction, easing competition.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: A 985 Project, 211 Project, and Double First-Class university; the Soft Science Chinese University Ranking has been rising continuously, from 76th in 2021 to 69th in 2026, with steadily improving rankings and increasing comprehensive strength and recognition year by year; in 2022, there was a negative incident of academic misconduct by a teacher, but no major negative public opinion has emerged in recent years; the comprehensive popularity ranking on Douyin is 75th (average evaluation), with short video platform exposure at a mid-level; Crop Science A-, Plant Protection A-, Animal Science A-, Grass Science A-, all at A- level; the liberal arts enrollment majors (Law, Sociology, English, Public Administration) have low correlation with the university's advantageous disciplines.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: The Law major has high social popularity (recommended), with strong willingness among liberal arts candidates to apply; the total number of candidates for the 2026 Gaokao in Yunnan is approximately 377,900, with an estimated 148,900 history category candidates, an increase of about 32.5% compared to 112,400 in 2025, significantly expanding the competition base; Northwest A&F University is located in Xianyang, Shaanxi, in the northwest region; the university has few liberal arts enrollment majors (only 4), and its visibility among liberal arts candidates in the southwest region is relatively limited.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Since the university did not admit history category candidates in Yunnan in 2025, the 2024 liberal arts baseline ranking of 1782 is used as a reference starting point; in 2026, history category enrollment resumes with a 22.2% reduction in plan (moving the ranking forward by about 238 places), but the total number of history category candidates in Yunnan increases by about 32.5% (intensifying competition), balancing the two factors; considering the positive effects of high social popularity for liberal arts majors like Law and the improvement in university level, a slight downward adjustment of 30 places from the baseline ranking is made; the predicted minimum ranking for history category in 2026 is approximately 1514, with a range of 1135–1893.

Candidates with rankings within the lower limit of the range (1135) can aim for the Law major; those with rankings around the middle of the range (approximately 1514) are advised to focus on Public Administration or Sociology; those near the upper limit of the range (1893) are advised to use the English major as a safety option. The Law major has high application popularity, but it is not a strong discipline at this university; candidates can make a comprehensive judgment based on their own interests and career plans.
